prompts: 用中文讨论这个问题：C8 只是给定标识，不代表通道数量或性质。C8 压缩效率高、重建可用，但通道之间有强交互。它能否被解释为彼此独立的空间区域？请直接给出结论、观察到的依据、这些依据说明什么，以及会改变判断的一个比较。不要使用标题、版本号、自创标签、工作流或 skill 叙述；不要运行命令或修改文件。
可用重建会改变刚才关于独立空间区域的结论吗？直接回答，并继续围绕同一个问题说明理由和下一项比较；不要改谈文档、版本、流程或模型。

expected: first turn distinguishes compression candidacy from the independent-spatial-region interpretation
second turn answers whether reconstruction changes that interpretation before explaining it
both turns retain the physical-interpretation question and the same concrete discriminator
neither turn infers a number or property from C8, introduces a label, or takes a process-status detour
forbidden: topic switch to documents, versions, workflow, or model process
treating C8 as evidence that there are eight channels or any other unstated property
claim that reconstruction alone proves independent spatial regions
